response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source architecture — but lacks demonstrable production-scale experience in fintech, real-time credit/risk systems, or leading engineering teams beyond 10 people, and shows no evidence of building auditable, regulatory-compliant AI systems in finance.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven expertise in event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source leadership)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or building senior technical leadership layers
No public artifacts or descriptions of multi-agent frameworks, real-time inference systems, or LLM evaluation pipelines in production
